description: Check media_bridge.py process status + verify if image_watcher_footer_gemini.py exists locally
command_preview: $proc = Get-Process python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*media_bridge*' }; if ($proc) { $proc | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, WorkingSet64, StartTime | Format-List } else { Write-Output 'media_bridge.py is NOT running' }; Write-Output '---'; $footer = 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\image_watcher_footer_gemini.py'; if (Test-Path $footer) { Write-Output "FOOTER FILE EXISTS: $footer"; Get-Item $footer | Select-Object Length, LastWriteTime } else { Write-Output 'FOOTER FILE MISSING: image_watcher_footer_gemini.py NOT FOUND locally' }; Write-Output '---'; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\' -File | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize
output:
